findings: SKILL.md correctly makes metaswarm explicit opt-in and requires partial/failed rather than silent downgrade for incomplete full-child launch.
SKILL.md lacks banned-model validation in parse/launch phrasing, so a user-supplied banned model string is not blocked at the skill layer.
Depth Guard is implicit through squad allocation/leaf instructions rather than enforced as an explicit numeric depth check.
Recovery is well-defined, but there is no explicit graceful stop command beyond teardown.
